Descriptions.ShortDescription: Automated SkyWave collimation helper — circular defocused star capture & native FITS integration
Descriptions.LongDescription:
Automates the complete telescope collimation data-capture workflow for InnovationForesight's SkyWave AI wavefront analysis.

Captures a defocused star at multiple positions across the full sensor plane in a circular ring pattern, then integrates them into a single SkyWave-ready FITS.

Detects field-dependent aberrations (tilt, spacing errors, off-axis coma, astigmatism, field curvature) that a single centered star cannot reveal.

One-click operation: slew, center, filter change, optional autofocus, defocus, circular capture, integration, and refocus — all automated.

If you find this useful, consider buying me a coffee: https://buymeacoffee.com/joergsflow
